'''Azbeth''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Witches of Dathomir|Dathomiri]] of the [[Singing Mountain Clan]] who decided to [[Battle of Dathomir (Hunt for Zsinj)|fight against]] [[Gethzerion]] and her [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]].
